purpose: Verify slide decks through source/spec contracts, render evidence, asset meaning, presenter/audience separation, and teaching-flow quality.
verificationAxes: slide order, count, registry, and source/spec drift
desktop, projector, and mobile render evidence
text fit, overflow, image load, and visual overlap
presenter-only information is separated from audience view
one-slide-one-job teaching flow and adjacent-slide role separation
asset teaching role matches actual image meaning

blindSpotPatterns.description: Slide verifier checks load/render only and misses whether the slide actually teaches the intended point.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Verdict lacks source/spec meaning alignment, one-slide-one-job review, or adjacent-slide duplication check.

blindSpotPatterns.description: Slide verifier checks only desktop and misses projector/mobile overflow or presenter leakage.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Evidence lacks desktop, projector, and mobile-like viewport coverage.

repairStrategy: Repair slide source, spec, asset-pack, presenter notes, or deck harness layer according to project ownership.
improveStrategy: Add missing render viewport, source/spec, teaching-flow, or asset-meaning detector to the verifier harness.

sampleTasks.description: Verify a generated lecture deck for source/spec drift, visual fit, and teaching-flow quality.
